  • Hide All Code
  • Download Rmd

Fase 1 - Caracterización de la arquitectura

Francisco Manuel González Nuño

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(ggrepel)
library(SingleCellExperiment)
library(scater)
library(scuttle)
library(monocle)
library(SingleR)
library(cacoa)
source("Functions/run_cacoa_composition.R")

conflicted::conflict_prefer("select", "dplyr")
conflicted::conflict_prefer("filter", "dplyr")
conflicted::conflict_prefer("rename", "dplyr")

1 Carga de datos

readRDS("../Datos/sce_qc.rds") -> sce
rownames(sce) <- rowData(sce)$gene_name

2 Exploración de datos

vars <- getVarianceExplained(sce,
                             variables = c("batch", "patient",
                                           "region_long",
                                           "Gender", "Age",
                                           "AJCC.Stage", "Primary.Site"),
                             assay.type = "harmony")
plotExplanatoryVariables(vars)

2.1 PCA

plotReducedDim(sce,
               dimred = "PCA_harmony",
               colour_by = "region_long") +
  labs(title = "PCA - región") +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(title = "Región"))

plotReducedDim(sce,
               dimred = "PCA_harmony",
               colour_by = "patient") +
  labs(title = "PCA - paciente") +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(title = "Paciente"))

2.2 t-SNE

sce <- runTSNE(sce, 
               dimred = "PCA",
               # ncomponents = 2, 
               perplexity = 30)
               # max_iter = 2000)
plotTSNE(sce,
         colour_by = "patient") +
  labs(title = "t-SNE con PCs - paciente") +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(title = "Paciente"))

plotTSNE(sce,
         colour_by = "region_long") +
  labs(title = "t-SNE con PCs - región") +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(title = "Región"))

2.3 UMAP

set.seed(123)
sce <- runUMAP(sce,
               dimred = "PCA_harmony",
               n_neighbors = 10,
               min_dist = 0.15,
               metric = "cosine",
               # metric = "correlation",
               n_epochs = 2000
               )

plotUMAP(sce,
         colour_by = "patient") +
  labs(title = "UMAP con PCs - paciente") +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(title = "Paciente"))

plotUMAP(sce,
         colour_by = "region_long") +
  labs(title = "UMAP con PCs - región") +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(title = "Región"))

ggcells(sce,
        mapping = aes(x = UMAP.1,
                      y = UMAP.2,
                      colour = region_long)) + 
  geom_point(alpha = 0.6) + 
  facet_wrap(~patient) +
  labs(x = "UMAP 1",
       y = "UMAP 2",
       colour = "Región") + 
  theme_bw() + 
  theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 15),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 16),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 13),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 15))

2.4 Anotación celular

Mediante métodos automáticos (como SingleR), se pueden asignar etiquetas de tipo celular a cada célula basándose en la expresión génica y comparándola con referencias de tipos celulares conocidos. Esto podría ayudar a identificar qué tipos celulares están presentes en cada región anatómica y cómo se distribuyen. Si bien es cierto que los métodos automáticos pueden no ser perfectos.

Anotación con referencia estándar:

ref <- celldex::HumanPrimaryCellAtlasData()
# ref <- celldex::BlueprintEncodeData()
# ref <- celldex::MonacoImmuneData()
set.seed(123)
sce$SingleR_labels <- SingleR(
  test = sce,
  ref = ref,
  labels = ref$label.main,
  assay.type.test = "logcounts"
)
sce$cellAnnot <- sce$SingleR_labels$labels
plotReducedDim(sce,
               dimred = "UMAP",
               colour_by = "cellAnnot") +
  labs(title = "UMAP with SingleR annotations - cell type - standar ref") +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(title = "Cell type"))

Anotación con referencia personalizada:

if(!file.exists("../Datos/pb_ref_full.rds")){
library(Matrix)

# 1. expresión
  
mat <- readMM("../Datos/CRC sc ref/matrix.mtx")
dim(mat) # si es de 371223 genes, borrar punto 3

genes <- read.delim("../Datos/CRC sc ref/matrix.genes.tsv", header = FALSE)
barcodes <- read.delim("../Datos/CRC sc ref/matrix.barcodes.tsv", header = FALSE)

rownames(mat) <- make.unique(genes$V2)
colnames(mat) <- barcodes$V1


# 2. tSNE + labels

tsne <- read.delim("../Datos/CRC sc ref/crc10x_tSNE_cl_global.tsv", header = TRUE)
tsne <- tsne[tsne$NAME != "TYPE", ]
rownames(tsne) <- tsne$NAME


# 3. construir referencia

ref_crc <- SingleCellExperiment(
  assays = list(logcounts = mat),
  colData = tsne
)

c_genes <- base::intersect(rownames(ref_crc),
                           rownames(sce))
ref_crc <- ref_crc[c_genes,]

# 5. agregamos por tipo celular

## full

ref_pb_full <- aggregateAcrossCells(
  ref_crc,
  ids = ref_crc$ClusterFull,
  use.assay.type = "logcounts"
)
saveRDS(ref_pb, "../Datos/pb_ref_full.rds")

## mid

ref_pb_mid <- aggregateAcrossCells(
  ref_crc,
  ids = ref_crc$ClusterMidway,
  use.assay.type = "logcounts"
)
saveRDS(ref_pb_mid, "../Datos/pb_ref_mid.rds")


} else {
  # si ya existen los cargamos
  ref_pb_full <- readRDS("../Datos/pb_ref_full.rds")
  ref_pb_mid <- readRDS("../Datos/pb_ref_mid.rds")
}
pred_crc_full <- SingleR(
  test = sce,
  ref = ref_pb_full,
  labels = colnames(ref_pb_full),
  assay.type.test = "logcounts",
  assay.type.ref = "logcounts"
)

pred_crc_mid <- SingleR(
  test = sce,
  ref = ref_pb_mid,
  labels = colnames(ref_pb_mid),
  assay.type.test = "logcounts",
  assay.type.ref = "logcounts"
)

sce$annFull <- pred_crc_full$pruned.labels
sce$annMid <- pred_crc_mid$pruned.labels


plotReducedDim(sce[, !is.na(sce$annMid)],
               dimred = "UMAP",
               colour_by = "annMid") +
  labs(title = "UMAP with SingleR CRC annotations - cell type - custom ref") +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(title = "Cell type"))

plotReducedDim(sce[, !is.na(sce$annFull)],
               dimred = "UMAP",
               colour_by = "annFull") +
  labs(title = "UMAP with SingleR CRC annotations - cell subtypes - custom ref") +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(title = "Cell subtype"))

ggcells(sce[,!is.na(sce$annFull)],
        mapping = aes(x = UMAP.1,
                      y = UMAP.2,
                      colour = annFull)) + 
  geom_point(alpha = 0.75,
             size = 1) + 
  stat_density2d() + 
  facet_wrap(~region_long) + 
  labs(x = "UMAP 1",
       y = "UMAP 2",
       colour = "Anotación") +
  theme_bw() + 
  theme(axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 15),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 16),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 13),
        strip.text = element_text(size = 15))

2.5 Proporciones celulares

2.6 Cálculo de proporciones celulares por paciente y tejido

proporcs <- as.data.frame(colData(sce)) %>%
  filter(!is.na(annFull)) %>%
  group_by(patient, region_long, annFull) %>%
  summarise(count = n()) %>%
  group_by(patient) %>%
  mutate(proportion_pat = count / sum(count)) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  group_by(region_long) %>%
  mutate(proportion_reg = count / sum(count)) %>%
  ungroup()

ggplot(proporcs, 
       aes(x = region_long, 
           y = proportion_reg, 
           fill = annFull)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", 
           position = "fill") +
  labs(title = "Proporción de tipos celulares por región",
       x = "Localización",
       y = "Proporción",
       fill = "Tipo celular") +
  scale_fill_manual (values = paletteer::paletteer_d("ggsci::category20c_d3")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

(tabla_RL_ann <- table(
  sce$annFull,
  sce$region_long
  ))
##                                            
##                                             Colon Normal Metastasis Higado
##   cE01 (Stem/TA-like)                                  9                 0
##   cE02 (Stem/TA-like/Immature Goblet)                  1                 0
##   cE03 (Stem/TA-like prolif)                           2                 1
##   cE04 (Enterocyte 1)                                  0                 0
##   cE06 (Immature Goblet)                               1                 0
##   cE10 (Tuft)                                          0                 1
##   cM02 (Macrophage-like)                               0                 0
##   cP1 (Plasma IgA)                                     1                 0
##   Tumor cE01 (Stem/TA-like)                            1               135
##   Tumor cE02 (Stem/TA-like/Immature Goblet)            0                 1
##   Tumor cE03 (Stem/TA-like prolif)                     0                30
##   Tumor cE04 (Enterocyte 1)                            0                 0
##   Tumor cE05 (Enterocyte 2)                            0                 2
##   Tumor cE06 (Immature Goblet)                         0                 2
##   Tumor cE07 (Goblet/Enterocyte)                       1                 0
##   Tumor cE09 (Best4)                                   1                21
##   Tumor cE10 (Tuft)                                    0                 5
##   Tumor cE11 (Enteroendocrine)                         0                24
##                                            
##                                             Metastasis Nodo Linfático
##   cE01 (Stem/TA-like)                                               0
##   cE02 (Stem/TA-like/Immature Goblet)                               0
##   cE03 (Stem/TA-like prolif)                                        0
##   cE04 (Enterocyte 1)                                               0
##   cE06 (Immature Goblet)                                            0
##   cE10 (Tuft)                                                       0
##   cM02 (Macrophage-like)                                            1
##   cP1 (Plasma IgA)                                                  0
##   Tumor cE01 (Stem/TA-like)                                        83
##   Tumor cE02 (Stem/TA-like/Immature Goblet)                         1
##   Tumor cE03 (Stem/TA-like prolif)                                 65
##   Tumor cE04 (Enterocyte 1)                                         1
##   Tumor cE05 (Enterocyte 2)                                         1
##   Tumor cE06 (Immature Goblet)                                      0
##   Tumor cE07 (Goblet/Enterocyte)                                    0
##   Tumor cE09 (Best4)                                                6
##   Tumor cE10 (Tuft)                                                 1
##   Tumor cE11 (Enteroendocrine)                                     18
##                                            
##                                             Metastasis post-tratamiento
##   cE01 (Stem/TA-like)                                                 0
##   cE02 (Stem/TA-like/Immature Goblet)                                 0
##   cE03 (Stem/TA-like prolif)                                          0
##   cE04 (Enterocyte 1)                                                 0
##   cE06 (Immature Goblet)                                              0
##   cE10 (Tuft)                                                         0
##   cM02 (Macrophage-like)                                              0
##   cP1 (Plasma IgA)                                                    0
##   Tumor cE01 (Stem/TA-like)                                          17
##   Tumor cE02 (Stem/TA-like/Immature Goblet)                           0
##   Tumor cE03 (Stem/TA-like prolif)                                   57
##   Tumor cE04 (Enterocyte 1)                                           0
##   Tumor cE05 (Enterocyte 2)                                           0
##   Tumor cE06 (Immature Goblet)                                        0
##   Tumor cE07 (Goblet/Enterocyte)                                      0
##   Tumor cE09 (Best4)                                                  0
##   Tumor cE10 (Tuft)                                                   1
##   Tumor cE11 (Enteroendocrine)                                        5
##                                            
##                                             Tumor Primario
##   cE01 (Stem/TA-like)                                    0
##   cE02 (Stem/TA-like/Immature Goblet)                    0
##   cE03 (Stem/TA-like prolif)                             5
##   cE04 (Enterocyte 1)                                    2
##   cE06 (Immature Goblet)                                 1
##   cE10 (Tuft)                                            0
##   cM02 (Macrophage-like)                                 0
##   cP1 (Plasma IgA)                                       0
##   Tumor cE01 (Stem/TA-like)                            236
##   Tumor cE02 (Stem/TA-like/Immature Goblet)              2
##   Tumor cE03 (Stem/TA-like prolif)                     240
##   Tumor cE04 (Enterocyte 1)                              1
##   Tumor cE05 (Enterocyte 2)                             19
##   Tumor cE06 (Immature Goblet)                           8
##   Tumor cE07 (Goblet/Enterocyte)                         0
##   Tumor cE09 (Best4)                                    13
##   Tumor cE10 (Tuft)                                      2
##   Tumor cE11 (Enteroendocrine)                          17
chi_tab <- chisq.test(tabla_RL_ann)
print(chi_tab$p.value)
## [1] 6.372942e-158
rcompanion::cramerV(tabla_RL_ann)
## Cramer V 
##   0.4803
pheatmap::pheatmap(chi_tab$residuals,
                   cluster_rows = F,
                   cluster_cols = F,
                   scale = 'row')

ggplot(proporcs, 
       aes(x = patient, 
           y = proportion_pat, 
           fill = annFull)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", 
           position = "fill") +
  labs(title = "Proporción de tipos celulares por paciente",
       x = "Localización",
       y = "Proporción",
       fill = "Tipo celular") +
  scale_fill_manual (values = paletteer::paletteer_d("ggsci::category20c_d3")) +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))

2.6.1 Análisis composicional

cao_CN <- run_cacoa_composition(
  sce = sce,
  target = "Tumor Primario",
  ref = "Colon Normal",
  celltype_col = "annFull",
  region_col = "region_long",
  patient_col = "patient",
  assay_name = "logcounts"
)
cao_CN$plotCellLoadings(show.pvals = T)

cao_MNL <- run_cacoa_composition(
  sce = sce,
  ref = "Tumor Primario",
  target = "Metastasis Nodo Linfático",
  celltype_col = "annFull",
  region_col = "region_long",
  patient_col = "patient",
  assay_name = "logcounts"
)
cao_MNL$plotCellLoadings(show.pvals = T)

cao_MH <- run_cacoa_composition(
  sce = sce,
  ref = "Tumor Primario",
  target = "Metastasis Higado",
  celltype_col = "annFull",
  region_col = "region_long",
  patient_col = "patient",
  assay_name = "logcounts"
)
cao_MH$plotCellLoadings(show.pvals = T)

2.7 Clustering

Se utiliza el algoritmo de clustering Louvain para identificar grupos de células que comparten patrones de expresión génica similares. Esto podría revelar subpoblaciones celulares dentro de cada región anatómica y ayudar a caracterizar la heterogeneidad celular presente en el tumor.

set.seed(123)

sce$cluster <- factor(
  igraph::cluster_louvain(
    scran::buildSNNGraph(
      sce,
      use.dimred = "PCA_harmony",
      k = 8
    )
  )$membership
)

plotReducedDim(sce,
               dimred = "UMAP",
               colour_by = "cluster") +
  labs(title = "UMAP with cluster") +
  guides(colour = guide_legend(title = "Cluster"))

2.7.1 Métodos supervisados

Probamos métodos como PLSD-DA, que es una técnica de reducción de dimensionalidad supervisada que busca encontrar componentes que maximicen la separación entre clases predefinidas. En este caso, se podrían usar las regiones anatómicas como clases para evaluar si existen patrones de expresión génica específicos asociados a cada región.

library(mixOmics)

splsda_res <- splsda(t(assay(sce,
                             "harmony")),
                   colData(sce)$region_long, 
                     ncomp = 5,
                     keepX = c(50, 50, 50, 50, 50))
splsda_df <- data.frame(splsda_res$variates, colData(sce))
ggplot(data = splsda_df,
       aes(x = X.comp1,
           y = X.comp2,
           # shape = region_long,
           color = region_long)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7) + 
  stat_ellipse(level = 0.95,
               show.legend = F) +
  # scale_color_brewer(palette = "Dark2") +
  labs(title = "sPLS-DA: Componentes 1 y 2",
       x = "sPLS-DA Component 1",
       y = "sPLS-DA Component 2") + 
  theme_bw() +
  guides(color = guide_legend(title = "Región"))

Se aprecia que el grupo “Metástasis post-tratamiento” se separa del resto de grupos en la dirección positiva de la primera componente discriminante, lo que sugiere que existen patrones de expresión génica específicos asociados a esta región anatómica. Sin embargo, este tipo de tejido pertenece únicamente al paciente CRC01, y los otros grupos no muestran una separación tan clara. Para evaluar mejor la separación entre los grupos de interés, nos quedamos únicamente con los grupos Tumor Primario y Metástasis de Nodo Linfático.

splsda_res <- splsda(t(assay(sce[, !(colData(sce)$region_long %in% c("Metastasis post-tratamiento", "Metastasis Higado", "Colon Normal"))],
                             "harmony")),
                   colData(sce[, !(colData(sce)$region_long %in% c("Metastasis post-tratamiento", "Metastasis Higado", "Colon Normal"))])$region_long, 
                     ncomp = 5,
                     keepX = c(50, 50, 50, 50, 50))
splsda_df <- data.frame(splsda_res$variates, colData(sce[, !(colData(sce)$region_long %in% c("Metastasis post-tratamiento", "Metastasis Higado", "Colon Normal"))]))

centroides <- splsda_df %>% 
  group_by(region_long) %>% 
  summarise(comp1 = mean(X.comp1), 
            comp2 = mean(X.comp2))


ggplot(data = splsda_df,
       aes(x = X.comp1,
           y = X.comp2,
           # shape = region_long,
           color = region_long)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.7) + 
  stat_ellipse(level = 0.95,
               show.legend = F) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Dark2") +
  labs(title = "sPLS-DA: Componentes 1 y 2",
       x = "sPLS-DA Component 1",
       y = "sPLS-DA Component 2",
       color = "Región") + 
  geom_point(data = centroides, 
             aes(x = comp1, y = comp2),
             shape = 4, size = 4, col = "black", 
             show.legend = F) +
  theme_bw()

vip_sPLSDA <- vip(splsda_res) %>% as.data.frame() %>% arrange(desc(comp1))

(main_vip_genes <- data.frame(GENE_COMP1 = rownames(vip_sPLSDA %>% arrange(desc(comp1)) %>% head(50)),
                             GENE_COMP2 = rownames(vip_sPLSDA %>% arrange(desc(comp2)) %>% head(50)))) %>%
  gt::gt() %>%
  gt::tab_header(title = "Top 50 genes VIP por componente") %>%
  gt::cols_label(GENE_COMP1 = "Componente 1",
                 GENE_COMP2 = "Componente 2") %>%
  gt::tab_options(table.font.size = "small")
Top 50 genes VIP por componente
Componente 1 Componente 2
IGFL2-AS1 EGFR-AS1
SECTM1 DEFA6
FABP1 IGFL2-AS1
MMP7 SECTM1
PRSS30P FABP1
CPVL PLAC8
PRSS33 MMP7

HULC SPP1

UCA1 AGR2
STMN3 CDKN1C
S100A9 SLC25A39
FAM210B PRR15L
PERP IGHG4
UBE2L6 TDO2
WDR24 TK1
 
(genes_comp1_2 <- vip_sPLSDA[base::intersect(main_vip_genes$GENE_COMP1, main_vip_genes$GENE_COMP2),c("comp1", "comp2")]) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = comp1, y = comp2)) +
  geom_point() +
  geom_text_repel(aes(label = rownames(genes_comp1_2)),
                  size = 3,
                  max.overlaps = 10) +
  labs(title = "Genes VIP en componentes 1 y 2",
       x = "VIP Componente 1",
       y = "VIP Componente 2") +
  theme_minimal()

genes_comp1_2 %>%
  tibble::rownames_to_column(var = "genes") %>%
  gt::gt() %>%
  gt::tab_header(title = "Intersección de top 50 genes VIP en componentes 1 y 2") %>%
  gt::cols_label(genes = "Genes",
                 comp1 = "VIP Componente 1",
                 comp2 = "VIP Componente 2") %>%
  gt::tab_options(table.font.size = "small")
Intersección de top 50 genes VIP en componentes 1 y 2

AGR2 2.178247 4.666826
 
openxlsx::write.xlsx(vip_sPLSDA,
                     "../Results/VIP_sPLSDA.xlsx",
                     rowNames = T)
saveRDS(sce, "../Datos/sce_2.rds")
sessionInfo()
## R version 4.5.2 (2025-10-31 ucrt)
## Platform: x86_64-w64-mingw32/x64
## Running under: Windows 11 x64 (build 26200)
## 
## Matrix products: default
##   LAPACK version 3.12.1
## 
## locale:
## [1] LC_COLLATE=Spanish_Spain.utf8  LC_CTYPE=Spanish_Spain.utf8   
## [3] LC_MONETARY=Spanish_Spain.utf8 LC_NUMERIC=C                  
## [5] LC_TIME=Spanish_Spain.utf8    
## 
## time zone: Europe/Madrid
## tzcode source: internal
## 
## attached base packages:
## [1] splines   stats4    stats     graphics  grDevices utils     datasets 
## [8] methods   base     
## 
## other attached packages:
##  [1] mixOmics_6.34.0             lattice_0.22-9             
##  [3] MASS_7.3-65                 cacoa_0.5.0                
##  [5] SingleR_2.12.0              monocle_2.38.0             
##  [7] DDRTree_0.1.6               irlba_2.3.7                
##  [9] VGAM_1.1-14                 Matrix_1.7-4
